testcase.name: initializationError

failure.message: org.junit.runners.model.InvalidTestClassError: Invalid test class 'com.sidequest.data.local.PersistenceRoundTripPropertyTest': 1. Method property31_persistenceRoundTripSurvivesRestartEditsAndDeletes() should be void
